indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is located in the center of the room, which could obstruct the view and make it difficult to focus on the computer.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor provides a warm and comfortable surface to place the computer and other equipment.

indicators.name: light
indicators.rationale: The ceiling lights provide ample illumination for the workspace, reducing eye strain.

reasoning_summary: The room has a good layout with a wooden floor and sufficient lighting, but the bed's position might cause some inconvenience for computer work.
